H1_identifier_humanisation_query_collisi.evidence: eight probe-bound compiler digests collapse to four text-only query identities; all four expected same-class pairs collide

H2_prefix_or_normalisation_mismatch.evidence: fresh query vectors and stored point vectors are unit normalised and reproduce accepted receipt rankings

H3_vector_payload_binding_error.evidence: all eight target payload identities are present and full-corpus local cosine replay reproduces the accepted ranking

H4_corpus_hubness.evidence: two sections appear in the top ten for all eight probes; maximum top-ten hub frequency is eight

H5_multilingual_alignment_failure.evidence: the identical-query collision spans English and Traditional Chinese targets before language-specific ranking can discriminate them

H6_target_label_validity_error.evidence: all target section identifiers resolve to stored points and receive finite cosine scores in the 107-point corpus

H7_top_k_request_defect.evidence: full-corpus local cosine replay exactly matches every accepted receipt top-ten ranking

H8_batch_mapping_defect.evidence: all eight receipt rankings match independently recomputed local cosine rankings in probe order
